content:
I just noticed, that Hydra is failing. Is this known, or is this caused by an to old rust version on hydras side?
https://hydra.nix-community.org/build/2044984/nixlog/2
Looks like an older rustc-nightly version to me. The #[feature] around const_fn changed recently
Sad. It’s the newest I can get. It’s actually not a nightly, but just a stable, compiled with nightly features
